The solution now has 200 commands from typing-tracking across all available OCR files. This is better than 405 (which had too many duplicates) but still less than the expected 262. The typing-tracking approach captures commands when the typing line changes, but at 5fps some commands might be typed and executed between frames without a visible change in the typing line (when Enter is pressed quickly).
